title: Use cranes to access and dismantle trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use cranes to access and dismantle trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for the use of cranes for tree access and dismantling

pcs.text: Identify requirements for crane assisted tree work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify requirements for crane assisted tree work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify requirements for crane assisted tree work.

pcs.text: Determine the requirements for crane access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the requirements for crane access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the requirements for crane access.

pcs.text: Inspect site to identify site conditions, features and hazards that may affect crane set-up and operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site to identify site conditions, features and hazards that may affect crane set-up and operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site to identify site conditions, features and hazards that may affect crane set-up and operation.

pcs.text: Determine crane type and size, and develop plan for crane assisted tree work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine crane type and size, and develop plan for crane assisted tree work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine crane type and size, and develop plan for crane assisted tree work.

pcs.text: Communicate requirements to crane operator to confirm plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate requirements to crane operator to confirm plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate requirements to crane operator to confirm plan.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of emergency procedures, rescue personnel and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of emergency procedures, rescue personnel and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of emergency procedures, rescue personnel and equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan for the use of cranes for tree access and dismantling

elements.title: Prepare to conduct crane work

pcs.text: Determine access to site and gain approval from stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine access to site and gain approval from stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine access to site and gain approval from stakeholders.

pcs.text: Confirm site preparations and notification of local residents and authorities according to dismantling plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site preparations and notification of local residents and authorities according to dismantling plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site preparations and notification of local residents and authorities according to dismantling plan.

pcs.text: Liaise with crane operator and crane crew to confirm set-up, clearances from electrical services and working area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with crane operator and crane crew to confirm set-up, clearances from electrical services and working area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with crane operator and crane crew to confirm set-up, clearances from electrical services and working area.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Liaise with crane operator to determine load limit at working radius
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with crane operator to determine load limit at working radius?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with crane operator to determine load limit at working radius.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss strategy with crane operator and crew to confirm site, environment and crane working limitations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine lowering and processing zones and communicate to work team.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on arboriculture tools and equipment required for dismantling.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use crane to access trees using an approved crane access method according to industry codes, procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with crane operator and observer using agreed communication methods.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communication with crane operator and work team during operations using agreed communication methods.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use hand and whistle signals to communicate with crane operator according to industry standards.

pcs.text: Select and apply crane lifting methods and sequence according to dismantling strategy and safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine weight of each tree section and communicate to crane operator.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attach crane with lifting gear to each tree section according to load limits, centre of gravity and planned lifting operation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate pre-tension requirements to crane operator.

elements.title: Use crane to dismantle tree

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with crane operator regarding lifting operation and adjust dismantling strategy.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust work pace and methods to match processing capacity of ground crew and environmental conditions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform final dismantling and lifting operations for tree removal work according to specifications.
